title: Diecast Genuine London Bus and London Taxi Set (Mini) Souvenir - Moving Wheel Action - Sightseeing - Hop On Hop Off - Toy - 5 Passenger Cab - Hackney Cab - London Souvenir
features: London Big Red Double Decker Bus and Black Taxi Models
Made of Die Cast Metal with Plastic Parts
One of the Best Selling London Souvenir Bus and Taxi Model Set
Ideal Gift for Children Over the Age of 3 Year
description: London big red double decker Bus and black Taxi models made of Die-Cast metal. These are moving wheel action models. Beautifully made not to scale. One of the best selling London souvenir toy bus and Taxi models. Ideal for children over the age of 3 years. Come in a window presentation box. Taxi Approximate size 7.5 x 2.8 x 2.8 cm; Bus Approximate size 9.0 x 2.8 x 4.5 cm
